name: WRKACTJOB
description: Displays and works with the status of jobs currently active on the system (jobs running, in a subsystem, or on a job queue).

params.name: SBS
params.description: Subsystem description to limit the list to. Default *ALL.

params.name: JOB
params.description: Job name to limit the list to. Default *ALL.

params.name: OUTPUT
params.description: *, *PRINT — send the display to the printer instead of the screen.

name: WRKSPLF
description: Displays and works with spooled files, letting you hold, release, delete, or send them.

params.name: FILE
params.description: Spooled file name to limit the list to.

params.name: USRDTA
params.description: User who owns the spooled files.

name: WRKOBJ
description: Works with a list of objects, showing their attributes and letting you perform actions like move, rename, or delete.

name: WRKLIB
description: Displays and works with a list of libraries.

params.name: LIB
params.description: Library name or generic name, or *ALL.

name: DSPLIB
description: Displays a list of the objects in a library.

params.name: LIB
params.description: Name of the library to display.

name: CRTLIB
description: Creates a new library.

params.name: LIB
params.description: Name of the library to create.

params.name: AUT
params.description: Authority given to public users. Default *SYSVAL.

name: DLTLIB
description: Deletes a library and everything in it. Cannot be undone without a restore.

params.name: LIB
params.description: Name of the library to delete.

name: DSPJOB
description: Displays detailed information about a job: status, attributes, open files, call stack, spooled files.

params.name: JOB
params.description: Qualified job name, or * for the current job.

name: CHGJOB
description: Changes the attributes of a job, such as run priority, output queue, or logging level.

name: ENDJOB
description: Ends a job that is currently running.

name: HLDJOB
description: Holds a job, suspending it until released with RLSJOB.

name: RLSJOB
description: Releases a previously held job so it can continue running.

name: WRKSYSSTS
description: Displays and lets you change system status information: storage pools, CPU utilization, and auxiliary storage usage.

name: WRKDSKSTS
description: Displays disk (auxiliary storage) status: percent used and I/O rates per unit.

name: WRKUSRPRF
description: Displays and works with a list of user profiles.

params.name: USRPRF
params.description: User profile name, generic name, or *ALL.

name: DSPUSRPRF
description: Displays the attributes of a single user profile.

name: CHGUSRPRF
description: Changes the attributes of a user profile: password, authority, initial menu, and more.

params.name: PASSWORD
params.description: New password, or *NONE to disable password signon.

name: WRKSBS
description: Displays and works with a list of active subsystems.

name: WRKSBSJOB
description: Displays and works with the jobs running in a specific subsystem.

name: STRSBS
description: Starts a subsystem so it can begin processing jobs.

name: ENDSBS
description: Ends a subsystem and the jobs running within it.

name: WRKOUTQ
description: Displays and works with a list of output queues and the spooled files in them.

name: WRKJOBQ
description: Displays and works with a list of job queues.

name: DSPPGM
description: Displays the attributes of a program object: creation info, size, language, and modules.

name: DSPFD
description: Displays the description of a database, device, or save file: record format, size, member info.

name: DSPFFD
description: Displays field-level description of a database file: field names, types, lengths.

name: CPYF
description: Copies all or part of the data in a database, device, or save file to another file.

name: STRSQL
description: Starts the interactive SQL session (Run SQL Statements) for ad-hoc queries against DB2 for i.

name: RUNSQLSTM
description: Runs a batch of SQL statements from a source file member.

params.name: SRCFILE
params.description: Qualified source physical file containing the statements.

params.name: SRCMBR
params.description: Member name within the source file.

name: SAVLIB
description: Saves the contents of one or more libraries to tape, save file, or optical media.

params.name: DEV
params.description: Device name, or *SAVF to save to a save file.

name: RSTLIB
description: Restores a library previously saved with SAVLIB.

params.name: SAVLIB
params.description: Name of the library as it was saved.

name: SAVOBJ
description: Saves one or more individual objects rather than a whole library.

name: RSTOBJ
description: Restores individual objects previously saved with SAVOBJ.

params.name: SAVLIB
params.description: Library the objects were saved from.

name: WRKLNK
description: Displays and works with objects in the IFS (integrated file system) directory structure.

name: WRKMSGQ
description: Displays and works with the messages in a message queue.

name: DSPMSG
description: Displays the messages in a message queue without the work-with options.

name: SNDMSG
description: Sends a short message to a user's message queue.

name: DSPLOG
description: Displays the history log (QHST) — system events, job starts/ends, messages.

name: WRKPRB
description: Displays and works with problems logged in the system problem log.

name: GO
description: Displays a menu, e.g. GO MAIN for the IBM i Main Menu.

name: SIGNOFF
description: Signs off the current interactive job, ending the session.

params.name: LOG
params.description: *LIST, *NOLIST, *SYSVAL — whether to produce a job log.

name: DSPPFM
description: Displays the records in a physical file member in a browsable view.

name: RUNQRY
description: Runs a Query/400 definition and displays or prints its output.

name: WRKREGINF
description: Displays and works with exit point registration information.

name: WRKENVVAR
description: Displays and works with environment variables at the job or system level.

name: ADDENVVAR
description: Adds a new environment variable.

name: CRTPF
description: Creates a physical file (a database table).

params.name: RCDLEN
params.description: Record length in bytes, if not created from DDS/SQL source.

name: CRTSRCPF
description: Creates a source physical file for storing DDS, RPG, CL, or SQL source members.

name: STRPDM
description: Starts Programming Development Manager, a menu-driven tool for managing libraries, source, and programs.

name: WRKSYSVAL
description: Displays and works with system values that control IBM i behavior.

params.name: SYSVAL
params.description: System value name or generic name, or *ALL.

name: DSPSYSVAL
description: Displays the current setting of a single system value.

params.name: SYSVAL
params.description: Name of the system value to display.

name: RTVSYSVAL
description: Retrieves a system value into a CL variable, for use inside a CL program.

params.name: SYSVAL
params.description: Name of the system value to retrieve.

params.name: RTNVAR
params.description: CL variable to receive the value.

name: CHGSYSVAL
description: Changes a system value that controls IBM i behavior.

name: CRTDTAARA
description: Creates a data area, a small object used to share a value between programs/jobs.

params.name: DTAARA
params.description: Qualified name of the data area to create.

name: CHGDTAARA
description: Changes the value stored in a data area.

name: DSPDTAARA
description: Displays the current value and attributes of a data area.

name: CRTDTAQ
description: Creates a data queue, used for fast asynchronous communication between jobs.

params.name: DTAQ
params.description: Qualified name of the data queue to create.

params.name: MAXLEN
params.description: Maximum length of an entry on the queue.

name: SNDDTAQ
description: Sends an entry to a data queue.

name: RCVDTAQ
description: Receives (and removes) an entry from a data queue.

params.name: WAIT
params.description: Seconds to wait for an entry if the queue is empty. Default *IMMED.

name: CRTJRN
description: Creates a journal, used to record changes made to journaled objects for recovery/audit.

params.name: JRNRCV
params.description: Journal receiver that will hold the journal entries.

name: CRTJRNRCV
description: Creates a journal receiver, the object that actually stores journal entries.

params.name: JRNRCV
params.description: Qualified name of the receiver to create.

name: STRJRNPF
description: Starts journaling changes made to a physical file.

params.name: JRN
params.description: Journal to record the changes to.

name: DSPJRN
description: Displays or prints entries from a journal.

name: WRKJRN
description: Works with a list of journals and their receivers.

name: DSPPTF
description: Displays the status of PTFs (fixes) applied to a licensed program.

name: WRKPTFGRP
description: Displays and works with PTF groups installed on the system.

name: LODPTF
description: Loads PTFs from media onto the system, prior to applying them.

params.name: LICPGM
params.description: Licensed program to load PTFs for.

params.name: DEV
params.description: Device the PTF media is on.

name: APYPTF
description: Applies PTFs that have been loaded, activating the fixes.

params.name: LICPGM
params.description: Licensed program to apply PTFs for.

params.name: SELECT
params.description: *ALL or a list of specific PTF numbers.

name: SAVSYS
description: Saves the operating system (Licensed Internal Code and QSYS) — a full system-level backup.

params.name: DEV
params.description: Tape or optical device to save to.

name: WRKTCPSTS
description: Displays and works with the status of TCP/IP interfaces or connections.

name: CFGTCP
description: Displays a menu for configuring TCP/IP: interfaces, routes, host table, and more.

name: PING
description: Tests TCP/IP connectivity to a remote system.

params.name: RMTSYS
params.description: Remote host name or IP address to ping.

name: NETSTAT
description: Displays a menu for TCP/IP network status: connections, interfaces, routes.

name: WRKDEVD
description: Displays and works with a list of device descriptions.

params.name: DEVD
params.description: Device description name, generic name, or *ALL.

name: WRKCFGSTS
description: Displays and works with the status of a configuration object: device, controller, line, network.

name: VRYCFG
description: Varies a configuration object on or off (e.g. a device, line, or controller).

name: STRPRTWTR
description: Starts a print writer, which sends spooled files on an output queue to a printer.

name: ENDWTR
description: Ends a print writer or subsystem writer job.

name: WRKWTR
description: Displays and works with a list of writer (spool/print) jobs.

name: DLTSPLF
description: Deletes a spooled file.

name: HLDSPLF
description: Holds a spooled file so it won't print until released.

name: RLSSPLF
description: Releases a held spooled file so it can print.

name: CHGSPLFA
description: Changes the attributes of a spooled file, such as its output queue or priority.

params.name: OUTQ
params.description: New output queue for the file.

name: GRTOBJAUT
description: Grants authority to an object for a user or group.

params.name: USER
params.description: User or group profile to grant authority to.

name: RVKOBJAUT
description: Revokes previously granted authority to an object.

params.name: USER
params.description: User or group profile to revoke authority from.

name: WRKAUTL
description: Displays and works with a list of authorization lists.

name: EDTOBJAUT
description: Displays and lets you edit the full authority list for an object in a grid.

name: CRTBNDRPG
description: Compiles an RPG source member into a standalone (bound) program object.

params.name: PGM
params.description: Qualified name of the program to create.

params.name: SRCFILE
params.description: Source physical file containing the RPG source.

name: CRTBNDCL
description: Compiles a CL source member into a standalone (bound) program object.

params.name: PGM
params.description: Qualified name of the program to create.

params.name: SRCFILE
params.description: Source physical file containing the CL source.

name: STRDBG
description: Starts interactive debug mode against a program, for stepping through and setting breakpoints.

params.name: PGM
params.description: Qualified name of the program to debug.

name: ENDDBG
description: Ends the current interactive debug session.

name: DUPOBJ
description: Duplicates an object within the system, optionally under a new name or library.

name: RNMOBJ
description: Renames an object.

name: MOVOBJ
description: Moves an object from one library to another.

name: CRTSBSD
description: Creates a subsystem description, which defines how a subsystem processes jobs.

params.name: SBSD
params.description: Qualified name of the subsystem description to create.

name: CHGSBSD
description: Changes the attributes of an existing subsystem description.

name: CRTJOBD
description: Creates a job description, a template of attributes used when a job is submitted.

params.name: JOBD
params.description: Qualified name of the job description to create.

name: CHGJOBD
description: Changes the attributes of a job description.

name: WRKJOBD
description: Displays and works with a list of job descriptions.

params.name: JOBD
params.description: Job description name, generic name, or *ALL.

name: SBMJOB
description: Submits a batch job to run a command or program asynchronously on a job queue.

params.name: CMD
params.description: Command to run in the submitted job.

name: WRKSYSACT
description: Displays real-time system activity: jobs/threads by CPU, DB, and I/O usage.

name: STRPFRMON
description: Starts performance data collection for later analysis.

params.name: MBR
params.description: Member name to store the collected data in.

name: ENDPFRMON
description: Ends the current performance monitor data collection.

name: CPYTOIMPF
description: Copies a database file's data out to a delimited (e.g. CSV) stream file in the IFS.

name: CPYFRMIMPF
description: Copies data from a delimited stream file in the IFS into a database file.
